title: Kingship is responsibility
source_observation: Epic connects ruler conduct with public welfare
risk: Royal spectacle may replace ethical role
decision: Show king through protection and institutions

title: Desire cannot override autonomy
source_observation: Udayakumaran pursues Manimekalai despite her choice
risk: Prince becomes romantic hero without accountability
decision: Treat refusal as central dramatic conflict

title: Karma is not legal judgement
decision: Separate belief system from legal responsibility

title: Prison reform is institutional
decision: Show kitchens learning care and service

title: Grief does not justify abuse
source_observation: Queen harms Manimekalai after son's death
